Meta 发布 Muse Spark：迈向个人超级智能

Meta Introduces Muse Spark: Scaling Towards Personal Superintelligence

2026-04-09

Meta 宣布推出 Muse Spark，一项旨在实现个人超级智能的新计划。这是 Meta 在 AI 领域的重要布局，致力于让每个人都能拥有自己的超级智能助手。

Muse Spark 的核心愿景包括：

  • 为个人用户提供强大的 AI 能力
  • 实现真正的个性化智能体验
  • 支持多种应用场景和任务
  • 推动个人超级智能的普及

这是 Meta 在 AI 竞赛中的重要一步，体现了其对个人 AI 市场的重视。

阅读完整文章：https://ai.meta.com/blog/introducing-muse-spark-msl/

Meta announces Muse Spark, a new initiative aimed at achieving personal superintelligence. This represents Meta's significant investment in AI, dedicated to giving everyone their own superintelligent assistant.

Muse Spark's core vision includes:

  • Providing powerful AI capabilities for individual users
  • Enabling truly personalized intelligent experiences
  • Supporting diverse application scenarios and tasks
  • Driving the democratization of personal superintelligence

This is an important step for Meta in the AI race, demonstrating its focus on the personal AI market.

Read the full article at https://ai.meta.com/blog/introducing-muse-spark-msl/
